title: Task-1 Inheritance Effectiveness Validation
description: Verify that Akashic Task-1 inheritance package measurably improves next-round candidate quality through controlled A/B comparison

userStories.title: Ensure Akashic has sufficient Task-1 data
userStories.description: Verify Akashic has ingested at least 5-10 Task-1 Bridge results to generate meaningful inheritance package
acceptanceCriteria: Check if akashic_memory_v2.py has Task-1 data
If insufficient, run 5 quick Task-1 evaluations
userStories.verificationCommand: python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, 'socs_universe_search/multiverse_engine'); from akashic_memory_v2 import AkashicMemoryV2; a = AkashicMemoryV2(); print(f'Structures: {len(a.structures)}, Task1 patterns: {len(a.task1_knowledge.stable_delegation_patterns)})"

userStories.title: Generate Task-1 inheritance package
userStories.description: Have Akashic write Task-1 inheritance package to disk for Fast Genesis consumption
acceptanceCriteria: Verify file contains: stable_delegation_patterns, trust_update_priors, generator_priors

userStories.title: Generate Round A candidates (control, no inheritance)
userStories.description: Generate 50 candidates using default priors (no inheritance influence)

userStories.title: Run Round A through Bridge
userStories.description: Evaluate all Round A candidates through Bridge Shadow and Dry-Run stages
acceptanceCriteria: Record: admission, shadow_pass, dry_run_pass, tier assignment

userStories.title: Run Round A Bridge-passed through Mainline
userStories.description: Evaluate Bridge-passed candidates through strict Mainline validation
acceptanceCriteria: Run task1_mainline_validator.py on Bridge Tier B candidates
Use: 1000 tasks, 3 seeds per candidate (faster mode)

userStories.title: Generate Round B candidates (treatment, with inheritance)
userStories.description: Generate 50 candidates using Task-1 inheritance package to bias generation
userStories.verificationCommand: python -c "import json; c=json.load(open('benchmark_results/task1_inheritance/round_b/candidates.json')); td=[x["trust_decay"] for x in c]; print(f'Count: {len(c)}, Mean trust_decay: {sum(td)/len(td):.3f}')"

userStories.title: Run Round B through Bridge
userStories.description: Evaluate all Round B candidates through Bridge (same thresholds as Round A)
acceptanceCriteria: Use identical criteria as Round A

userStories.title: Run Round B Bridge-passed through Mainline
userStories.description: Evaluate Round B Bridge-passed candidates through Mainline
acceptanceCriteria: Run task1_mainline_validator.py on Bridge Tier B candidates
Same parameters as Round A (1000 tasks, 3 seeds)

userStories.title: Statistical comparison of Round A vs Round B
userStories.description: Compare metrics between control and treatment to measure inheritance effectiveness
acceptanceCriteria: Calculate: Bridge pass rate (A vs B)
Calculate: Mainline approve rate (A vs B)
Calculate: Mean throughput delta (A vs B)

userStories.title: Generate inheritance effectiveness report
userStories.description: Write comprehensive report documenting whether inheritance improved search quality
acceptanceCriteria: Generate markdown report with tables and charts
